consultation.text: In addition to our wide range of products, we offer comprehensive consulting services to ensure the optimal use of our solutions. Our experienced team is on hand to ensure that your requirements are always met. Whether it's modernizing existing systems or integrating new technologies, we can help you maximize the efficiency and performance of your processes while minimizing costs.
consultation.title: Comprehensive advice and support for maximum efficiency

intro.text1: Through our selected distribution partners, we offer you a powerful network of products and services. From surgical instruments, HF surgical instruments, orthopaedic shaver systems, pumps and imaging systems to logistics solutions, accessories for AEMP and neurosurgical drilling systems, we offer a complete package of innovative solutions.
intro.text2: Our company places particular emphasis on quality and reliability. We therefore work exclusively with renowned manufacturers and specialized sales partners to ensure that our customers always receive the best products and services. Through close cooperation and regular exchange with our partners, we can react quickly to market changes and offer innovative technologies and customized solutions that meet the highest standards. With our selected sales partners, we offer you a high-performance network.
intro.title: A whole universe of innovative solutions from medical technology to logistics in the B2B & B2C sector

optic.text: The outstanding image quality enables precise diagnosis and treatment. The range includes arthroscopes from 1.9mm to 4.0mm in various viewing directions. Laparoscopes from 5.0mm to 10.0mm Hysteroscopes and cystoscopes are part of the standard range.
optic.title: The high-quality optical system of our endoscopes delivers razor-sharp images of the highest informative value

bissinger.text: The handle with a twist - Regardless of the surgeon's position in relation to the patient, this new type of bipolar forceps can always be brought into an ergonomically optimal position by simply twisting the handle. This prevents premature fatigue and enables more relaxed, precise surgery.
bissinger.title: ORBITARIS Bipolar coagulation forceps

products.button: Do you have questions about one of our products?

eberle.text: The Eberle C3 is an advanced control unit that controls motorized handpieces for arthroscopy. It is equipped with a 5-inch touch display that offers automatic brightness adjustment and provides soft keys for basic functions. Functions include adjustable oscillation and the choice between revolutions or frequency in oscillation mode.
eberle.title: Eberle C3 shaver system

hupfer.text: Best handling and safe use in the supply and disposal of sterile goods: our transport trolleys meet the maximum requirements.
hupfer.title: Container and sterile goods transport trolleys

medicon.text: The "piccolino" spinal spreader system is suitable for miniaturized subperiosteal paravertebral access techniques as well as for transmuscular access techniques. Due to the distally emphasized opening of the speculum, the surgical target area is not restricted compared to conventional techniques, despite the reduced dimensions.
medicon.title: Spreader system "piccolino"

nouvag.text: The HighSurg 30 motor system enables efficient operation thanks to the dual motor principle. Connect up to two electronic motors and use the desired handpiece for comfortable and precise work.
nouvag.title: HighSurg 30, high-speed motor system with dual motor principle for a wide range of applications

micromed.intro: Micromed is one of our distribution partners. Use the logo to visit their website for product and company information.

products.text: We distribute products from renowned manufacturers such as Nouvag, Medicon, Hupfer, Eberle, Tontarra, Bissinger and Micromed. We offer a wide range of surgical instruments, medical devices, sterile supply solutions and electrosurgical instruments. With our comprehensive product portfolio, we offer you customized solutions for your specific needs. Trust in our expertise and our commitment to quality and service.
products.title: Learn how we can help you with sales.

tontarra.text: The CLEAN WAVE laminectomy punches & rongeurs are one-piece models, so disassembly for cleaning purposes is not necessary. In comparison to multi-piece instruments, components cannot be lost during the cleaning and sterilization process. The wave-shaped shaft surfaces also enable a significant reduction in friction.
tontarra.title: CLEAN WAVE - Punching & rongeurs

seo.description: A whole universe of innovative solutions from medical technology to logistics in the B2B & B2C sector
seo.title: Globaler Vertrieb: Erfolgreicher Markteintritt mit maßgeschneiderten Konzepten und lokaler Unterstützung
